programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2018, a killer shoots 33-year-old restaurant worker Joshua Webb outside an apartment block in Beckley, W.V.; to solve the murder and identify the culprit, police must unravel a web of lies by following a trail of security footage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In a Calgary pub in 2010, 36-year-old barman Dexter Bain is brutally slain during a failed robbery; detectives use surveillance footage from a nearby store to find the suspect and stage a filmed sting operation to prove who pulled the trigger.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Brianna Foisy, 21, and Jason Netter, 41, are killed on an Alaskan bike path in 2016; it's a crime that baffles police, until similar murders begin to happen; police follow clues in a shocking murder to track the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2017, police find 51-year-old Jorge Rodriguez wandering the streets with gunshot wounds near a crashed car riddled with bullet holes; to get justice for Jorge's heartbroken daughters, they follow a trail of CCTV left by the mysterious suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: An escaped inmate murders Debra Johnson, a highly respected Correctional Administrator, at her home outside the prison; with the public at risk, police scour through surveillance footage for clues to hunt him down before he strikes again.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered in her apartment, the killer leaves behind bloody bare footprints that eventually lead to a conviction.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: A murder victim's lost dog becomes the key clue in solving her murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Will video evidence of a young woman's abduction allow police to find her?

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.sub-title: The Mortician, the Murder, the Movie
programme.desc: The murder of 81-year old Marjorie Nugent by her younger companion, Bernie Tiede, captures the imagination of filmmaker Richard Linklater, who turns it into the movie, "Bernie;" later, Linklater will learn he too has become part of the plot.

programme.desc: The murder of 81-year old Marjorie Nugent by her younger companion, Bernie Tiede, captures the imagination of filmmaker Richard Linklater, who turns it into the movie, "Bernie;" later, Linklater will learn he too has become part of the plot.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered in her apartment, the killer leaves behind bloody bare footprints that eventually lead to a conviction.

programme.title: Deadly Recall
programme.desc: Twenty-six-year-old Florence Ballino is found murdered; her attacker deliberately leaves behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators, but Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadly Recall
programme.desc: Former Tennessee Titan quarterback and public hero Steve McNair is found dead in his condo; the body of a young female is also present in an apparent double homicide.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: Church parishioners call 911 when they find their priest stabbed to death, then police uncover an earlier 911 call made by the priest himself and track a missing cell phone to find his killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: Calling 911, a young father gasps that he has accidentally shot himself while working on a farm; the police hear a second shot on the line while racing to find him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: In a distressing 911 call, a woman reports someone is breaking into her home, then the dispatcher hears a scream and a gunshot; investigators soon connect the case to a previous home invasion and race to solve the crimes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: A woman returns home to find her husband unconscious and bleeding on the floor of their horse barn; a 911 operator coaches her through CPR, but it's too late, and police later use the call itself to find clues to a plot to kill a beloved father.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: In Logan, Ohio, investigators receive word someone has been kidnapped from their job at the bank in a car that resembles a police cruiser; eventually, detectives discover a very personal connection between the victim and the kidnappers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: Responding to a home invasion, police find one family member has been killed while another has been left in critical condition; it doesn't take long for detectives to start suspecting the culprit could be someone very close to home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: In Ore City, Texas, firefighters extinguish a burning truck to reveal the charred remains of a human corpse inside; it soon becomes apparent that this fiery incident was no accident.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: Confronted with a grisly Valentine's Day surprise, police find a bullet-riddled body in a family's home; the usual suspects have alibis, forcing detectives to follow a trail of secrets, manipulation and betrayal to arrive at the truth.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A five-year relationship between neighbors falls apart when one borrows the other's lawnmower and supposedly returns it broken; camaraderie morphs into rage, threats, and physical violence until a bloody murder devastates the community.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Once-friendly neighbors on a mountain road become sworn enemies after one family calls police about a theft -- violating the unspoken tradition of leaving authorities out of disputes; years of conflict finally culminate with shots fired.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: The mountain road between them fails to keep two long-time neighbors from tormenting each other; seemingly small events bring their decadeslong hostility to a bloody boil, and property lines become battle lines in a fight to the death.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: An apartment-dwelling family finds their peace and quiet shattered when a loud neighbor moves into the unit directly overhead; the conflict engulfs both sides resulting in flying fists, drawn weapons, and a man left bleeding out in the hallway.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A man returns to his hometown after years away; he receives a warm welcome from the residents until the noise from a new neighbor's puppies turns him into a vengeful menace who goes to war with the entire community.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: An Army veteran delivers a parcel to his neighbor, but instead of receiving gratitude, he ignites a war between the two military men that spirals out of control, until the feud finally ends in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A 19-year-old coed leaves her apartment and never returns; when her body is found in a desert river basin, police and internet sleuths wonder if she was a victim of an alleged killer known as the Zombie Hunter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A home intruder abducts a 60-year-old woman in the night; local sheriffs search relentlessly until they discover another horrifying attack just ten miles away that fits the same profile; is there a serial predator haunting Florida's Gulf Coast?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: For the first time, a former colleague breaks down how one housewife built her multimillion-dollar empire on deception; Taylor Armstrong sheds new light on her husband's alleged abuse and the unsettling rumors that still surround his death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: A home intruder abducts a 60-year-old woman in the night; local sheriffs search relentlessly until they discover another horrifying attack just ten miles away that fits the same profile; is there a serial predator haunting Florida's Gulf Coast?

programme.title: Murder Decoded
programme.desc: A man calls 911 after finding blood inside a friend's home; officers enter to find a beloved community activist shot dead; detectives piece together clues, bloody footprints, bullet fragments and a credit card trail to find a cold-blooded murderer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Decoded
programme.desc: After ranchers spot the body of a brutally beaten teenage girl on a riverbank, deputies conduct countless interviews but to no avail; finally, cutting-edge technology helps police lift DNA from the murder weapon and zero in on the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Twenty-two-year-old mother Shawn Williams heads to the store late one night and never comes home, then her body is found the following day along an Oklahoma river; investigators wonder if one of the men in Williams' life might be her killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: After 32-year-old Mark Mueller's body is pulled from the shore of Lake Michigan, police wonder how his favorite fishing spot became a scene for murder; a burned-out car found miles away provides some answers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: The body of 20-year-old transgender woman CeCe Dove is found floating in a pond 20 miles from her Cleveland home, and detectives consider motives personal and primal as they hunt down her ruthless killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: After the body of 18-year-old Sharyn Kills Back is found in a storm drain, Arlington, Texas, detectives are left with few leads; then, a tip comes in 20 years later, and detectives band together to bring her killer to justice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City, Mo., and her family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Police question suspects in the inner circle of Jackie Galloway, a woman found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots; a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to the shocking discovery of a budding serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper preying on women in South Central Los Angeles; after decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A brutal 1970 home invasion claims the lives of Army surgeon Jeffrey MacDonald's wife and daughters, leaving him the lone survivor; authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald committed the crime himself.
